_meta.keyKnowledge: We describe how to choose and prepare food for healthy eating.

_source.w: We describe how to choose and prepare food for healthy eating.
y: Making good food choices supports our health, energy and concentration.
Learning preparation techniques builds our independence in the kitchen.
Understanding nutrition helps us look after ourselves and others.
eg: We sort foods using the Australian Guide to Healthy Eating.
We practise safe food preparation techniques like washing, peeling and chopping.
We plan a healthy lunch and explain why we chose each food.
We investigate how cooking changes food — making it softer, tastier or safer to eat.
We learn about food labels and what the information tells us.
We prepare a simple healthy snack for our class.
